description: S44H - Top Bar Redesign All Platforms: Completely rewrite _buildTopBar in chat_screen.dart to support mobile, tablet landscape, and desktop layouts. Add share button, more options button with bottom sheet (rename, clear, new, delete), center title/project display, and adapt icons/layout per platform.
steps: Rewrite the _buildTopBar method in frontend/lib/presentation/screens/chat/chat_screen.dart. MOBILE top bar (56px height, AppColors.bgPrimary bg, 1px bottom border AppColors.borderDefault, no elevation): Left side - IconButton with Icons.menu_rounded (20px, textMuted) shown only on phone + tablet portrait. Center (Expanded Column): chat title or 'New Chat' (DM Sans 15px w600 textPrimary, max 1 line ellipsis), and if projectId is set, show project name (DM Sans 11px AppColors.persian, max 1 line ellipsis). Right side (Row gap 4): Export button (Icons.download_outlined 20px textMuted, show when messages.length > 0), Share button (Icons.ios_share_outlined 20px textMuted, show when messages.length > 0, on tap: Share.share formatted chat text), More button (Icons.more_horiz_rounded 20px textMuted, on tap: show _buildMoreOptionsSheet).

TABLET LANDSCAPE + DESKTOP top bar: Same structure but no hamburger icon (showPermanentSidebar is true). Add a Text 'Share' button (DM Sans 13px w500 textMuted) instead of icon for share. Optionally show model name subtitle if there is enough space.
EMPTY STATE top bar (no chat selected, no chatId): Title shows 'Mio' in DM Serif Display 18px. No right side buttons.

Add _showMoreOptionsSheet method: shows a bottom sheet with options: 'Rename chat' (Icons.edit_outlined, on tap shows rename dialog with TextField, Save calls ChatService.updateChatTitle via PATCH /chat/chats/{id}), 'Clear chat' (Icons.delete_sweep_outlined, confirm dialog with red Delete, clears local messages state), 'New chat' (Icons.add_outlined, navigates to AppRoutes.chat), Divider, 'Delete chat' (Icons.delete_outlined, AppColors.error color, confirm dialog, calls ChatService.deleteChat, navigates back). Use existing ChatService methods updateChatTitle and deleteChat.

Add the share_plus import to chat_screen.dart (import 'package:share_plus/share_plus.dart'). The share function formats messages as 'Chat from Mio

{role}: content
...' and calls Share.share(). Add dart:io import for Platform checks.
Ensure the existing export button logic (ExportMenuWidget.showExportSheet) is preserved and moved to the new right-side icon row.
acceptance_criteria: Top bar shows hamburger only on phone/tablet-portrait, not on desktop/tablet-landscape
Center shows chat title (or 'New Chat') with project subtitle when projectId is set
Right side shows export, share, more buttons when messages exist
More button opens bottom sheet with Rename, Clear, New Chat, Delete options
Delete calls DELETE via ChatService.deleteChat and navigates away
Empty state shows 'Mio' title only, no action buttons
Desktop/tablet-landscape shows 'Share' as text instead of icon
verification: Read back the modified chat_screen.dart and verify all top bar logic
Verify imports are complete (share_plus, dart:io if needed)
Verify ChatService methods (updateChatTitle, deleteChat) are called correctly
